highlights.headline: Braden Frager keeps Nebraska rolling with a slam and a trey
highlights.description: Braden Frager scores five straight points for Nebraska with a dunk and a 3-pointer.

tracking.trackingName: NCB_One-Play (Braden Frager keeps Nebraska rolling with a slam and a trey) 2026/03/19 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Pryce Sandfort scored 23 points and Nebraska rolled to its long-awaited first NCAA Tournament victory, beating Troy 76-47 on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nebraska gets its first NCAA Tournament win, beating Troy 76-47 behind Pryce Sandfort's 23 points

highlights.headline: Edmonds' clutch bucket helps TCU hold off Ohio State
